# AfriGlyph

> Cultural infrastructure for the African internet — a B2B API delivering premium, culturally authentic Glyphs for African fintech apps.

## Company

- Name: AfriGlyph Inc.
- Location: Delaware, USA
- Website: https://afriglyph.com
- Contact: pilot@afriglyph.com
- Demo: https://cal.com/afriglyph/demo

## Product

AfriGlyph is an API/SDK that replaces generic payment success screens with culturally specific celebration moments commissioned from African digital artists. Partners integrate with one API call; AfriGlyph returns regionally appropriate Glyphs in GIF, PNG, and Lottie formats.

## Target Audience

B2B fintech and product teams building apps for African users who want to improve retention, dwell time, and cultural authenticity on payment success screens.

## Key Differentiators

- Commissioned African digital art, not stock or generic emoji
- "Verified by AfriGlyph" artist attribution on every Glyph
- Artist royalty payments on each view
- Fintech-compliant: no PII, only region and transaction context
- 30-day pilot program ($1,000) with integration support

## Pages

- Home: https://afriglyph.com/
- Creator Attribution Example: https://afriglyph.com/creator-attribution
- Privacy: https://afriglyph.com/privacy
